examples: The belfry abounds in ornamental carving.
A floor under the bells of an open belfry.
I've got hundreds living in my belfry and in the attic.
Torrance is still deliberating whether to end his captaincy with that sweet victory at The Belfry.
Carved swags encircle the drum beneath the dome, reinforcing the free-standing columns that surround the belfry below.
